## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss Claire Blood-Cheney's background and potential fit for a Chief of Staff role at fwd.digital.](https://fathom.video/share/MChbQUaEyksStXcyrDkyEBZHmafNzVyn?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Claire has a strong background in growth marketing, operations, and early-stage startups](https://fathom.video/share/MChbQUaEyksStXcyrDkyEBZHmafNzVyn?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [fwd.digital is experiencing rapid growth and needs operational support to scale effectively](https://fathom.video/share/MChbQUaEyksStXcyrDkyEBZHmafNzVyn?tab=summary&timestamp=10.0)
  - [The Chief of Staff role would focus on special projects, leadership team support, and being an extension of Marcel](https://fathom.video/share/MChbQUaEyksStXcyrDkyEBZHmafNzVyn?tab=summary&timestamp=320.0)
  - [Both parties seem excited about the potential fit and alignment on growth mindset](https://fathom.video/share/MChbQUaEyksStXcyrDkyEBZHmafNzVyn?tab=summary&timestamp=318.0)

## Topics

### Claire's Professional Background

  - [Started career at Within, a brand performance agency, working on accounts like Spanx and Shake Shack](https://fathom.video/share/MChbQUaEyksStXcyrDkyEBZHmafNzVyn?tab=summary&timestamp=503.0)
  - [Moved to Atomic, a venture studio, to work more closely with early-stage startups](https://fathom.video/share/MChbQUaEyksStXcyrDkyEBZHmafNzVyn?tab=summary&timestamp=1781.0)
  - [Currently at Neo, managing deal flow and operations for their investment and accelerator programs](https://fathom.video/share/MChbQUaEyksStXcyrDkyEBZHmafNzVyn?tab=summary&timestamp=1938.0)
  - [Consistent theme of working in small teams (4-6 people) and seeking rapid growth opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/MChbQUaEyksStXcyrDkyEBZHmafNzVyn?tab=summary&timestamp=1624.0)

### fwd.digital's Current State and Needs

  - [Experiencing rapid growth: close to $4M ARR, signing multiple large contracts](https://fathom.video/share/MChbQUaEyksStXcyrDkyEBZHmafNzVyn?tab=summary&timestamp=344.0)
  - [Capacity limited: more deals in pipeline than they can currently handle](https://fathom.video/share/MChbQUaEyksStXcyrDkyEBZHmafNzVyn?tab=summary&timestamp=386.0)
  - [Need to build better systems and processes to scale operations](https://fathom.video/share/MChbQUaEyksStXcyrDkyEBZHmafNzVyn?tab=summary&timestamp=408.0)
  - [Considering fundraising to fuel growth and build out team](https://fathom.video/share/MChbQUaEyksStXcyrDkyEBZHmafNzVyn?tab=summary&timestamp=333.0)

### Chief of Staff Role and Responsibilities

  - [Run leadership meetings and manage EAs](https://fathom.video/share/MChbQUaEyksStXcyrDkyEBZHmafNzVyn?tab=summary&timestamp=2027.0)
  - [Take on special projects, particularly in 0-to-1 stages](https://fathom.video/share/MChbQUaEyksStXcyrDkyEBZHmafNzVyn?tab=summary&timestamp=1938.0)
  - [Act as first line of defense for Marcel, triaging issues and solving bottlenecks](https://fathom.video/share/MChbQUaEyksStXcyrDkyEBZHmafNzVyn?tab=summary&timestamp=2708.0)
  - [Help build systems and processes that scale, thinking 2-3 steps ahead](https://fathom.video/share/MChbQUaEyksStXcyrDkyEBZHmafNzVyn?tab=summary&timestamp=2708.0)

### Claire's Motivations and Goals

  - [Seeks high impact-to-effort ratio in her work](https://fathom.video/share/MChbQUaEyksStXcyrDkyEBZHmafNzVyn?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
  - [Values fast feedback loops and ability to iterate quickly](https://fathom.video/share/MChbQUaEyksStXcyrDkyEBZHmafNzVyn?tab=summary&timestamp=1099.0)
  - [Wants to grow with a company and be part of scaling a small team](https://fathom.video/share/MChbQUaEyksStXcyrDkyEBZHmafNzVyn?tab=summary&timestamp=1781.0)
  - [Intentionally looking at pre-Series A companies for next role](https://fathom.video/share/MChbQUaEyksStXcyrDkyEBZHmafNzVyn?tab=summary&timestamp=1848.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Regroup in early January for further discussions](https://fathom.video/share/MChbQUaEyksStXcyrDkyEBZHmafNzVyn?tab=summary&timestamp=1152.0)
  - [Marcel to speak with a few other candidates for comparison](https://fathom.video/share/MChbQUaEyksStXcyrDkyEBZHmafNzVyn?tab=summary&timestamp=1152.0)
  - [Both parties to reflect on potential fit and alignment](https://fathom.video/share/MChbQUaEyksStXcyrDkyEBZHmafNzVyn?tab=summary&timestamp=1152.0)
